prompt.content:
In the DCF model, please update the following:

- For RemainCo, replace the 2027 - 2030 revenue growth rate for the Market Intelligence division with the 2020 - 2023 revenue CAGR (rounded to single decimal) of the company from the comparable list that had the highest EBITDA margin in 2024.
- Update the risk free rate for RemainCo to be the 10 year treasury rate on Oct 27, 2025.
- Update the risk free rate for S&P Global to be 75% of the new RemainCo figure and the risk free rate for S&P Mobility to be 90% of the new RemainCo figure

Output the updated Shareholder Equity value creation in millions, rounded to zero decimals.

rubrics.name: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is -$29,305 (acceptable range... (ver_9d1fa65c1dcf436f9de843b6550dd52f)

messages.content: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is -$29,305 (acceptable range $-29,598 to $-29,012).
